en.extract:
The Kosrae white-eye (Zosterops cinereus) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It is endemic to Kosrae Island.  This species and the grey-brown white-eye were formerly considered conspecific.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest.

The '''Kosrae white-eye''' ('''''Zosterops cinereus''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Zosteropidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Kosrae]] Island.  This species and the [[grey-brown white-eye]] were formerly considered [[Biological specificity#Conspecific|conspecific]].

Its natural [[habitat]] is [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]].
